introduction: The portal chamber thrums with malevolent energy. Shadow corruption oozes from the massive Aethel portal-stone, pulsing with each heartbeat of ancient power.

A figure stands before the portal, arms raised in ritual supplication. His robes are black silk adorned with silver Aethel glyphs. Shadow corruption visibly courses through his veins like black lightning.
This is High Cultist Vexthar the Consumed - the architect of Redstone's nightmare. The man who corrupted Marcus. The vessel through which the Shadow Blight seeks to return.
He lowers his arms and turns to face you. His eyes are completely black, reflecting nothing. When he speaks, multiple voices echo from his throat - his own, and the whispers of the Blight itself.
'Ah. The meddlers have arrived. How fortuitous. The ritual requires blood sacrifice, and you will serve admirably.'
Vexthar regards you with those terrible black eyes, a smile playing on lips too pale to be living.
'You stopped my cultists. You disrupted our supply lines. You even turned Marcus against me - though that is... disappointing. He showed such promise.'

'But you are too late. The portal is nearly complete. Soon the Shadow Blight will flow through this nexus point like water through a broken dam. The Crimson Reach will be consumed. Then the Kingdom. Then the world.'
'The Aethel tried to control it and failed. I will not make their mistake. I will BECOME it. We will be one - the Blight and I. Immortal. Eternal. Consuming.'

options.text: 'We destroyed your cult. We'll destroy you too.'
'The Blight is using you! You'll be consumed like everyone else!'

introduction: Vexthar's smile widens, revealing teeth stained black.
'Defiance. How predictable. Do you know how many have said those exact words before they died screaming?'
'The cult was merely a tool. Useful idiots who believed the lies I fed them. Marcus was the same - brilliant, corruptible, ultimately disposable.'
'But I? I have studied the Aethel texts for decades. I know the truth of what they discovered. The Shadow Blight is not a disease. It is evolution. Transcendence. The next step.'
'Consumed? You still don't understand.'
He gestures to his corrupted form, shadow energy crackling between his fingers.
'I INVITED this. I studied the ancient texts. I experimented on myself first - long before Marcus, before the cult.'
'The Shadow Blight chose me because I was WORTHY. I proved my dedication with every sacrifice, every ritual, every soul fed to the portal.'
'When the Blight flows through fully, I will be its first true vessel. Not consumed. UNITED.'

options.text: 'The Aethel failed. The Cavia were their test subjects. You'll fail too.'

introduction: Vexthar's smile vanishes. His face twists with rage.
'Marcus was WEAK! Sentimental! He clung to memories of a life he willingly abandoned! I should have let the Blight consume him completely instead of nurturing his pathetic remnant of conscience!'
'But it matters not. I have the Blight itself at my command. You, Marcus, and every living soul in this region will feed the ascension!'
Shadow corruption erupts from the portal. Vexthar raises his hands, and tendrils of pure darkness coalesce into forms - Blight Horrors, summoned from the corrupted depths.
'Come then! Let me show you what TRUE power looks like!'
Vexthar's black eyes fixate on you with sudden intensity.
'Fascinating. A Cavia. One of the Aethel's earliest test subjects. Your ancestors were the first to touch the dimensional energies - the experiments that eventually led to the Arcane Collapse.'
'Can you feel it? The Shadow Blight resonates with your very being. You were MADE by the forces I now command. In a way, you are already part of the Blight. You just don't know it yet.'
'How poetic that you should witness the fruition of what your kind began.'

options.text: 'My ancestors SURVIVED your precious Aethel. I'll survive you too.'

introduction: 'Spirit! I admire that. Futile, but admirable.'
'Very well, little experiment. Show me what generations of Aethel corruption have bred into your bloodline.'
He spreads his arms wide, shadow corruption swirling around him.
'Let us see if you can withstand what your ancestors helped create.'
High Cultist Vexthar the Consumed raises his arms. Shadow corruption erupts from the portal behind him, coalescing into writhing tendrils of pure darkness.
The temperature in the chamber plummets. Frost forms on the ancient stones. You can see your breath, and in it, you swear you see whispers made manifest.
This is it. The final battle. Everything you've fought for comes down to this moment.
If you fail, the portal opens fully. The Shadow Blight spreads across the Crimson Reach. Redstone falls. The kingdom falls. Darkness consumes everything.
But if you succeed... if you can defeat this corrupted priest and seal the portal...
The world has a chance.
You raise your weapons. Your companions stand beside you, ready.
Vexthar attacks.
